title: Build Agents on AWS - Step By Step with Demo

timeline.label: Introduction & Agent Architecture
timeline.text: Overview of autonomous agentic workflows on AWS. Understanding the orchestrator, memory stores, Action Groups, and Knowledge Bases.

timeline.label: Setting Up AWS Resources & IAM Roles
timeline.text: Creating secure execution roles in IAM. Granting Bedrock model invoke access, Lambda execute rights, and S3 read permissions to the agent principal.

timeline.label: Creating Action Groups & Lambda Functions
timeline.text: Writing the backend business logic in Python for AWS Lambda. Structuring the OpenAPI JSON specification so Bedrock understands the tool's schemas.

timeline.label: Attaching Knowledge Bases (RAG Integration)
timeline.text: Connecting the agent to an Amazon Bedrock Knowledge Base. Setting up semantic document search as a fallback retrieval tool for private corporate files.

timeline.label: Deploying & Testing the Agent (Demo)
timeline.text: Deploying agent drafts, setting session IDs, running sample queries, and inspecting reasoning traces (preprocessing, orchestration, postprocessing).
